scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -rf dist/obsync && mkdir -p dist/obsync && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css dist/obsync/ && if command -v zip >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd dist && zip -r ../obsync_v$npm_package_version.zip obsync); elif command -v bsdtar >/dev/null 2>&1; then bsdtar -a -cf obsync_v$npm_package_version.zip -C dist obsync; else echo 'zip or bsdtar is required' >&2; exit 1; fi
